visual_analysis.description: A red soda can with white text is in the front, blocking the black soda can.
A black soda can, likely soda water, is located behind the red soda can. This is interpreted as 'sprite'.
A white can with purple text and graphics, located behind the red soda can and to the right of the target.
A brown plastic bottle with a green cap, located to the right of the cans.

action_plan.explanation: The red soda can is in front of and blocking the robot's access to the target black soda can.
Pick the black soda can, which is the intended target, now that the path is clear.
